Status: active

     To                         Action      From
     --                         ------      ----
[ 1] 22                         ALLOW IN    Anywhere                   # SSH default
[ 2] 22 (v6)                    ALLOW IN    Anywhere (v6)              # SSH default
[ 3] 22/tcp                     ALLOW IN    203.0.113.7                # sftpj:v=1:user=alice
[ 4] 22/tcp                     ALLOW IN    198.51.100.42              # sftpj:v=1:user=bob
[ 5] 22/tcp (v6)                ALLOW IN    2001:db8::1                # sftpj:v=1:user=carol
[ 6] 22/tcp                     ALLOW IN    192.0.2.99                 # sftpj:v=2:user=dave
